note: Executive Dashboard tab, v3.0-PRICING revaluation. Figures are separated by confidence type and must NEVER be summed into one headline number.

money.label: Confirmed one-time cash
money.notes: One-off stated cash: Serus $250 + Ryze $400. Ssemble excluded (monthly rate).

money.label: Confirmed guaranteed cash
money.notes: No guaranteed multi-month contracts stated; equals explicit one-off cash.

money.label: Monthly recurring offers (per month)
money.notes: Ssemble $2,000/mo. Guaranteed duration UNKNOWN. NOT a guaranteed total.

money.label: Potential annualized recurring value
money.notes: $2,000/mo x 12 IF renewed. NOT confirmed revenue.

money.label: Conservative market value (viable deals)
money.notes: Low estimate. v3.0 pricing floor applied (was $63,875).

money.label: Base market value (viable deals)
money.notes: Fair market value if all viable deals closed at market (was $91,250).

money.label: Probability-weighted pipeline
money.notes: Likely close x close probability. PRIMARY realistic number (was $25,117).

money.label: Recoverable stale pipeline
money.notes: Value in expired/stale deals if re-opened.

money.label: Hidden licensing & rights value
money.notes: Paid-usage/whitelisting/licensing rights requested but usually unpriced (was $20,700).

money.label: Speculative affiliate upside
money.notes: Multiple affiliate/rev-share deals; no guaranteed base. Not counted as cash.

pricingPolicy.statement: Organic posting floor: $1,000/post minimum, 3-post minimum campaign, $3,000 minimum organic package. Paid usage, licensing, whitelisting, exclusivity and additional rights are priced separately and never bundled into the base fee. AI training / voice / likeness / synthetic-media rights are never bundled into a sponsorship fee — separate legal + commercial negotiation, baseline 3-10x content fee, typically declined.

igEvidence.confidence: MODERATE — public observations only; private Insights unavailable
